prompts.text: I'm giving away everything I know about AI video prompts. No signup wall. No email gate. No "follow for part 2." Just value. Here it is. THE SEEDANCE 2.0 PROMPT BIBLE: CATEGORY 1: PRODUCT VIDEOS Formula: [Product] + [Hero Angle] + [Environment] + [Brand Aesthetic] "A matte black wireless speaker, rotating on a marble podium, dramatic studio lighting from above, smoke wisps curling around base, Apple product photography aesthetic, 8K resolution, product name visible on subtle etching" Pro tip: Add "product name visible" — AI can render brand text. CATEGORY 2: LIFESTYLE / UGC Formula: [Person] + [Activity] + [Location] + [Time of Day] + [Mood] "A young woman in oversized white linen shirt, sipping coffee on a sun-drenched balcony overlooking the Amalfi Coast, early morning golden light, effortless Mediterranean summer aesthetic, handheld camera slight shake, candid moment feel" Pro tip: "Candid moment feel" makes AI remove the "too perfect" uncanny valley. CATEGORY 3: CINEMATIC / NARRATIVE Formula: [Character] + [Conflict/Action] + [Setting] + [Director Style] "A lone astronaut floating inside a damaged space station, emergency lights flickering red, debris floating in zero gravity, looking through cracked viewport at Earth below, Christopher Nolan cinematography, IMAX aspect ratio, Hans Zimmer-style tension building in audio" Pro tip: Specifying a composer influences the AI's audio generation. CATEGORY 4: SOCIAL MEDIA AD Formula: [Product] + [Lifestyle Context] + [Emotional Hook] + [CTA Visual] "A person unwrapping a sleek tech gadget on their couch, face lighting up with genuine surprise, cozy apartment setting, warm evening lamp light, shallow depth of field on product, TikTok native vertical framing, text overlay space at top" Pro tip: "Text overlay space" tells AI to leave room for your actual ad copy. CATEGORY 5: ABSTRACT / ARTISTIC Formula: [Element] + [Transformation] + [Color Palette] + [Medium Style] "Liquid gold flowing between geometric glass sculptures, morphing into organic flower shapes, dark void background, monochromatic gold and black palette, macro lens extreme close-up, fluid simulation physics" Pro tip: "Fluid simulation physics" activates the engine's best physics modeling. prompts.text: Certified bunny love Happy Easter (made with Seedance 2 on @wavespeed_ai ) Prompt share Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark whimsical drama, 18th-century Paris street at night, light snowfall, moody blue-gray tones, gas lamps glowing through fog, wet cobblestone reflections, stylized historical fantasy, subtle comedic undertone, dynamic camera movement, soft film grain. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: A white rabbit gentleman in worn-out beggar clothes and an old hat walks alone through a snowy, dimly lit Paris street, breath visible in the cold air, a distant silhouette of the Eiffel Tower faintly visible through fog. S2 (0.8s) Medium tracking shot: The rabbit shivers slightly, hands tucked in sleeves, քայլing slowly past elegant buildings and flickering street lamps. S3 (0.9s) Entrance shot: A noble orange cat lady in a flowing black evening gown walks gracefully into frame, holding a basket filled with colorful Easter eggs. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The basket sways gently, vibrant eggs contrasting against the dark, muted environment. S5 (0.8s) Sudden tension: A horse carriage bursts into frame, driven recklessly by a hyena dressed as a gray-clad servant, charging toward the cat lady. S6 (0.7s) Impact moment: The carriage nearly hits her—she recoils—basket tilts— S7 (0.8s) Slow-motion: Dozens of Easter eggs fly into the air, spinning, scattering across the snowy street. S8 (1.0s) Action burst: The white rabbit instantly dashes forward with surprising agility, body stretching elastically. S9 (1.0s) Comedic sequence: He catches eggs rapidly using both hands, feet, and even his mouth, juggling multiple at once with exaggerated, goofy facial expressions. S10 (0.8s) Close-up: One egg nearly falls—he flips backward, catching it with his foot mid-air. S11 (0.9s) Final catch: He lands awkwardly but successfully, holding all eggs stacked precariously, cheeks puffed, eyes crossed comically. S12 (0.8s) Reaction shot: The orange cat lady watches, eyes wide, then smiles warmly, clearly impressed. S13 (1.0s) Crowd reveal: Nearby animals in 18th-century attire (foxes, deer, cats, dogs) stop and begin applauding. S14 (1.0s) Emotional beat: The rabbit blushes slightly under his ragged hat, still trying to balance the eggs. S15 (1.2s) Final shot: Snow falls gently as the crowd claps, the orange cat lady nods gracefully in gratitude, warm light reflecting on the rabbit’s face as he stands awkwardly yet proudly. Motion & Effects: Soft snowfall particles, slow-motion physics for flying eggs, exaggerated squash-and-stretch animation, cinematic camera pans and snap zooms, warm vs cold lighting contrast, gentle humor blended with elegant dark fantasy atmosphere. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo Access to #Seedance2: https:// wavespeed.ai/models/bytedan ce/seedance-2.0/text-to-video?ref=shaochiu ...

prompts.text: Sun Wukong is my favorite legendary figure. (made with Seedance 2.0 on @yapper_so ) Prompt share Cinematic hyper-dynamic fast-paced multi-shot sequence, epic mythological battlefield, IMAX film simulation, 35mm Panavision lens, f/4, heavy cinematic color grading, dramatic contrast between dark necrotic tones and radiant golden divine light. Shot 1: Extreme close-up on Sun Wukong’s face, covered in dirt and blood, golden eyes flickering with exhaustion yet defiance. His fur is matted, his breathing heavy. He kneels in the center of a ruined battlefield, his golden staff cracked and planted into the ground for support. Around him, countless skeletal warriors slowly close in, their hollow eyes glowing with eerie green fire. Shot 2: Rapid shaky handheld shot circling Wukong. The skeletal army tightens its formation, bones clattering, rusted weapons scraping. Wukong struggles to stand, gripping his staff, as the undead swarm prepares to strike from all directions. Shot 3: Low-angle shot from behind Wukong. Just as the skeletons lunge forward, a faint golden glow begins to emerge behind him, cutting through the darkness like dawn breaking through a storm. Shot 4: Sudden explosive bloom of radiant golden light. A towering Buddha manifestation appears behind Wukong, विशाल and serene, radiating infinite divine energy. The battlefield is instantly bathed in warm, overwhelming golden luminosity. Shot 5: Fast upward tilt. Rows upon rows of celestial soldiers materialize in the sky and on the ground behind the Buddha—heavenly generals clad in ornate golden armor, divine banners flowing, weapons shining with sacred light. Shot 6: Whip-pan across the battlefield. The skeletons freeze mid-attack, their bodies trembling under the pressure of the divine aura. Golden light surges outward like a tidal wave. Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance. Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow. Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon. #sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

Shot 7: Ultra-fast sequence of disintegration shots. The skeletal army is instantly reduced to ash—bones crack, dissolve, and scatter into glowing dust, evaporating into nothingness under the overwhelming holy radiance.

Shot 8: Wide epic drone pull-back. Wukong stands silhouetted in front of the colossal golden Buddha and the vast heavenly army. The battlefield, once dark and corrupted, is now purified, glowing with divine light. Golden particles drift through the air like sacred snow.

Final frame: Freeze in epic tension—Wukong gripping his staff, head slightly bowed, while behind him the Buddha and celestial army radiate infinite power, dominating the horizon.

#sd2 #seedance #aivideo #RPG

prompts.text: **Environment:** A massive grassland under a violent thunderstorm. Rolling plains stretch toward distant mountains while lightning flashes illuminate the rain-soaked terrain. **Action:** 15.0s sequence from the POV of a lightning wolf racing through tall grass. Sparks of electricity crackle along the edges of the wolf’s vision as energy builds with every stride. At the 2-second mark the wolf accelerates into a full sprint. Rain streaks across the camera as the wolf leaps over fallen trees and rocky terrain. A rival wolf pack appears ahead. Velocity Ramp choreography: the lead wolf leaps through a lightning strike that hits the ground nearby — the moment slows dramatically as electricity branches across the field before snapping back as the chase resumes. **Camera:** Low, aggressive predator POV moving at extreme speed through the storm landscape. **Style & Constraints:** Volumetric rain simulation, lightning illumination, cinematic storm lighting, realistic terrain motion blur, 8K. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: Childhood nightmare unlocked...cat master fixed it (made with Seedance 2 on @nemovideoai ) Prompt share / #NemoOneShotChallenge / Seedance 2 Prompt (15 seconds total, each shot ~0.6–1.2s) Cinematic dark fairy-tale thriller with comedic twist, eerie enchanted forest, low-key lighting, cold moonlight filtering through dense trees, volumetric fog, high contrast shadows, dynamic handheld camera, expressive character animation, fast-paced storytelling. S1 (0.9s) Wide shot: An orange cat older brother in blue overalls and a gray flat cap runs barefoot through a dark forest, pulling along a white cat little sister in a dirty pink dress, both breathing heavily. S2 (0.8s) Rear tracking shot: The forest behind them echoes with distant howling wolves, shadows shifting between trees. S3 (0.9s) Forward reveal: Through the fog, a glowing candy house made of sweets appears at the end of the path, colorful and surreal against the dark woods. S4 (0.7s) Close-up: The siblings slow down, eyes wide—fear mixed with curiosity. S5 (0.8s) Door action: The orange cat cautiously pushes open the candy door, it creaks softly. S6 (0.9s) Interior wide: Inside, dim warm light reveals a strange room—giant half-open birdcage, scattered sweets, and a bed in the corner. S7 (0.8s) Close-up: On the bed lies a white-haired “grandma” in green pajamas and a white shower cap, blanket half covering her face. S8 (0.9s) Dialogue moment: The “grandma” weakly gestures toward the birdcage, implying there is cake nearby, voice soft and inviting. S9 (0.8s) Insert shot: A cake sits temptingly near the open birdcage door. S10 (1.0s) Action split: The little sister eagerly reaches for the cake, while the orange cat narrows his eyes, scanning the room. S11 (0.9s) Suspicion reveal: Close-up at the foot of the bed—a wolf tail sticks out from beneath the blanket. S12 (1.0s) Action burst: The orange cat instantly grabs a nearby large iron shovel, swings it with full force toward the “grandma’s” head. S13 (1.0s) Impact & reveal: The shower cap flies off—“grandma” leaps up in pain, revealing a ferocious wolf face, snarling before panicking. S14 (1.0s) Escape: The wolf stumbles and scrambles out the door, fleeing into the dark forest. S15 (1.2s) Final comedic beat: The orange cat scratches the back of his head proudly, while the little sister happily eats cake beside him, cheering with crumbs on her face. Motion & Effects: Dynamic chase camera, shaky handheld for tension, fast snap zooms during action, exaggerated character expressions, cloth and fur simulation, soft glow from candy elements, contrast between horror atmosphere and playful comedic timing. #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo ( NemoVideo × Seedance 2.0 The One-Shot Challenge) Contest Info: https:// nemovideo.com/workspace/seed ance-challenge ...

prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 Prompt 15s / 180 BPM / ONE CONTINUOUS SHOT / 360 POV downhill longboard run, viral energy, max chaos. SUBJECTS: First-person downhill longboard rider, front foot, deck nose, and flickering trucks appearing low in frame during drops, slides, and stair gaps. Flower pots, café chairs, scooters, cats, delivery bikes, tourists, and laundry erupt around the rider as sudden obstacles. ENVIRONMENT: Dense Mediterranean cliffside town, whitewashed stair alleys, blue shutters, tiled landings, sea-glow at the horizon, hanging laundry, tangled wires, sun-faded murals, narrow terraces, umbrellas, puddles, warm late afternoon light, deep stone shadows, layered rooftops dropping toward the coast below. MOOD: Adrenaline, max chaos, nonstop downhill street speed. COLOR LOGIC: Hyperreal Pop Look with sun-bleached whites, cobalt accents, coral signage, golden flare. CAMERA DETAILS: 360 action-cam POV, horizon-stable but brutal, nonstop forward drive, minimal roll, heavy stair vibration, sharp side and rear parallax, full-sphere chaos, no release. 0:00–0:03: POV freefalls into a steep stone stairwell, board nose rattling low in frame as the rider lands into brutal vibrating descent. A café server yanks a tray away from the line while walls, balconies, plants, and faces whip past inches away. SFX: sea wind, wheel chatter, stair hits, breath, distant crowd. 0:03–0:05: POV slashes left across a tiny tiled landing, clips past stacked flower pots, then snaps into another stair drop as hanging laundry lashes across the front hemisphere and tourists recoil. SFX: cloth slap, ceramic clink, wheel scrape, crowd gasp. 0:05–0:08: POV hammers the next staircase as a cat darts center frame and pigeons burst upward from a side ledge. The rider speed-check slides, then threads between a parked scooter and iron handrail with almost no clearance. SFX: tire chirp, wings flapping, metal rattle, stair thuds. 0:08–0:10: POV blasts over a short cobblestone gap between stair sections, trucks clacking, then drops straight into the next descending run as delivery bikes streak through the side wrap. SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

SFX: wheel buzz, curb thump, distant horn, crowd echo. 0:10–0:13: POV attacks two tight landings and another steep stepped lane, every hit jolting the sphere as rooftops, awnings, church bells, alley mouths, and flashes of sea curl around the viewer. SFX: air rush, heavy thump, stair chatter, wind buffeting. 0:13–0:15: POV rips to a cliff overlook and throws into a savage stand-up slide, dust and tiny pebbles spraying across the lower frame while the glowing sea-town skyline blooms around the full sphere. SFX: wheel screech, gravel spray, crowd roar. Hyperreal, continuous-shot chaos, no text, no logos.

prompts.text: A small white mushroom-eared creature is hurled forward from outstretched hands. It tumbles toward the camera, its white body swelling until it fills the entire frame — white flash. Chase camera locks behind the mushroom-eared creature as it rockets forward and slams into a wall of red crystalline armor. On impact it explodes — cyan crystal shards and square pixel-particles burst radially. The creature splits into several identical copies that scatter in every direction. The camera pulls straight up, revealing a circular red arena from overhead. The copies ricochet off surfaces in erratic bouncing arcs, each landing triggering a magenta or blue starburst flash. A white variant joins mid-sequence, trailing blue beam lines. The bouncing grows chaotic with overlapping hit effects. One mushroom-eared creature arcs directly past the lens, its body blocking the frame — wipe to black. A character stands behind a large golden wheel covered in ornate engravings. Both hands grip the wheel's rim and push — the wheel spins. The character grins while watching it turn. The camera starts tight on the character's hands and the spinning wheel, then slowly widens. Red carnival lamps ring the stage. Gold sparkles drift upward. Small white and black mushroom-eared creatures sit in the foreground as an audience, arms raised. The spinning golden wheel glows brighter frame by frame, bleaching to searing white. All figures become silhouettes against the expanding light. The camera pushes IN toward the light source — total whiteout. White flash erupts. A warm-colored blast wave expands outward from center screen. Smaller mushroom-eared creatures launch outward from the center in every direction. The character strikes a double peace sign as multicolored confetti rains from above.

prompts.text: Mockumentary (Vlog Style) As long as it can be imagined and described accurately and clearly, I feel like Seedance 2.0 can generate it all Seedance 2.0 prompt Style: Mockumentary (Vlog Style), hyper-realism, fixed camera real-shot feel, natural light, suspense comedy vibe, mobile phone vertical screen shooting texture Duration: 15 seconds Scene: Ordinary family living room, in front of white walls, afternoon sidelight streaming in from the window, yoga mat on the floor, clear human shadows projected on the wall Characters: Female lead @image1 , wearing a sports tank top and yoga pants, ponytail, recording a dance video against a phone tripod [00:00-00:05] Shot 1: Everyday Setup (Normalcy / Fixed Camera) Frame: Fixed camera medium shot, phone selfie perspective. Action: Female lead makes a heart gesture to the camera, then starts dancing a simple popular TikTok routine, movements a bit clumsy, occasionally glancing at the phone on the floor for cues. Key Details: At this point, the shadow on the wall is completely normal, perfectly in sync with her movements. Background is quiet, only the music from the Bluetooth speaker playing. Atmosphere: Utterly everyday, no hints of anything unusual. [00:05-00:11] Shot 2: BUG Emerges (The Glitch / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead repeats the same dance segment, and midway through a turn— High-Energy Moment (Core Punch): The shadow on the wall suddenly **doesn't follow the turn**, instead switching on its own to a completely different set of high-difficulty street dance moves (Breaking Power Move), the shadow executing a flawless Thomas full spin on the wall, smooth and fluid. Female lead hasn't noticed yet, keeps dancing her simple steps, but the shadow has fully broken sync, going wild with a solo on the wall. Director's Note: The shadow's dance skills should clearly outclass the body. The bigger the contrast in their moves, the stronger the comedy—body doing the "I Love You" hand gesture dance, shadow pulling off windmill floor moves. [00:11-00:15] Shot 3: Comedy Reversal (The Punchline / Same Fixed Camera) Action: Female lead finishes dancing and looks back at the phone replay, spots the shadow's anomaly, whips her head around to glare at the wall. Result: The shadow has now reverted to normal—obediently mirroring every one of her movements. Female lead suspiciously raises her right hand slowly, shadow raises its right hand too. She quickly switches to left hand—shadow follows without a hitch. Final Freeze: Female lead with a "Am I losing my mind?" expression straight to the camera, but in the last 0.5 seconds before the frame ends, the shadow sneaks in a peace sign gesture the instant she looks at the lens. Frame freezes on this beat.

prompts.text: Seedance2.0 機体の高速移動 prompt 针对您提供的巨大机甲 <<<Image1>>> (RAY-G),我为您设计了一份时长 15秒、风格极其干练、时髦(Stylish)且充满重力无视感的高速移动视频脚本。 这份提示词融合了《机动战士高达:水星的魔女》的灵动感与《金属装备》的机械冷硬风,重点在于**“瞬间爆发力”与“流线型轨迹”**。 视频生成脚本:【RAY-G: 极速切点 (Point Break)】 总时长: 15秒 风格标签: 极简主义、硬核机甲、高帧率动作、流体动力学、赛璐璐高级感。 (00:00 - 03:00) 序幕:静止的动量 (Static Potential) 镜头: 极近景(Extreme Close-up),斜角构图。 画面: 画面中心是 <<<Image1>>> 漆黑磨砂装甲上的橙色线条。线条开始像血管一样有节奏地剧烈闪烁,发出高频的嗡鸣声。 特效: 空气因高温产生剧烈扭曲(Heat Haze),背景的海面保持极度的静谧,形成动静反差。 [Prompt / 提示词]: 极近景,斜角构图。聚焦于机甲 <<<Image1>>> 的黑色磨砂装甲。鲜艳的橙色线条像呼吸灯一样高频闪烁。装甲缝隙喷射出极细的白色高压蒸汽。环境背景模糊。极简主义色彩,电影级质感,金属冷硬风格。 (03:00 - 06:00) 瞬发:突破音障 (Instant Acceleration) 镜头: 侧面追踪镜头(Side Tracking Shot),伴随强烈的拉伸感(FOV Shift)。 动作: 机甲 @image2 的鸟脚状后肢猛地一踏,脚踝处的滑轮(Land Spinner)高速旋转。瞬间从静止变为超音速,海面被切开一道笔直的白浪。 特效: 产生圆锥形的音爆云(Sonic Boom),橙色残影在空中拉出一道锋利的直线。 [Prompt / 提示词]: 侧面动态追踪。机甲 @image2 瞬间爆发起跑。足部滑轮高速旋转,在海面上切开巨大的V形浪花。超音速冲击波云。极速运动模糊,机甲拉出长长的橙色轨迹残影。空间拉伸感,震撼的加速度视觉。 (06:00 - 10:00) 垂直机动:重力反转 (Vertical Evasion) 镜头: 动态环绕升降镜头(Crane & Orbit)。 动作: 机甲奔向一座半毁的沿海巨塔,完全不减速,直接顺着垂直的墙面向上冲刺。它在垂直墙面上进行了一个华丽的180度螺旋转身,避开假想的攻击。 特效: 碎裂的玻璃碎片在空中飞舞,折射出夕阳的橙光。 [Prompt / 提示词]: 动态环绕镜头。机甲 <<<Image1>>> 在垂直建筑物表面高速冲刺,无视重力。身体进行优雅的螺旋旋转(Barrel Roll)。碎片飞溅,反射夕阳橙光。高对比度阴影,赛璐璐动画风格,极具张力的动作设计。 (10:00 - 13:00) 高光:战术滑行 (Tactical Slide) 镜头: 极低角度(Low Angle)对准足部。 动作: 机甲从高处跃下,足部在海面上进行长距离的漂移滑行。身体压低至极限,呈现掠食者般的姿态。 特效: 巨量的水雾被激起,在阳光下形成彩虹。 [Prompt / 提示词]: 极低角度。机甲 <<<Image1>>> 在海面上低重心漂移滑行。巨大的白色浪花与水雾。掠食者姿态,机械关节细致运作。夕阳余晖,金属反光,色彩饱和度极高,极致的画面纯净感。 (13:00 - 15:00) 尾声:单眼凝视 (The Glare) 镜头: 正面近景,逐渐变焦。 动作: 机甲滑行停止,身体由于惯性轻微晃动。头部导向板打开,中心那颗发光的青绿色单眼(Monocular)猛地看向镜头。 特效: 画面最后瞬间闪过一个“LOCK ON”的橙色UI界面,随即切黑。 [Prompt / 提示词]: 正面近景。机甲 @image2 停止滑行,蒸汽散去。头部青绿色单眼亮起,锐利冷酷。屏幕中心出现橙色锁定UI。电影级运镜,画面骤然切黑。

prompts.tweet_text:
Seedance2.0
機体の高速移動

prompt

针对您提供的巨大机甲 <<<Image1>>>   (RAY-G)，我为您设计了一份时长 15秒、风格极其干练、时髦（Stylish）且充满重力无视感的高速移动视频脚本。

这份提示词融合了《机动战士高达：水星的魔女》的灵动感与《金属装备》的机械冷硬风，重点在于**“瞬间爆发力”与“流线型轨迹”**。

视频生成脚本：【RAY-G: 极速切点 (Point Break)】
总时长： 15秒

风格标签： 极简主义、硬核机甲、高帧率动作、流体动力学、赛璐璐高级感。

(00:00 - 03:00) 序幕：静止的动量 (Static Potential)
镜头： 极近景（Extreme Close-up），斜角构图。

画面： 画面中心是 <<<Image1>>>   漆黑磨砂装甲上的橙色线条。线条开始像血管一样有节奏地剧烈闪烁，发出高频的嗡鸣声。

特效： 空气因高温产生剧烈扭曲（Heat Haze），背景的海面保持极度的静谧，形成动静反差。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极近景，斜角构图。聚焦于机甲 <<<Image1>>>   的黑色磨砂装甲。鲜艳的橙色线条像呼吸灯一样高频闪烁。装甲缝隙喷射出极细的白色高压蒸汽。环境背景模糊。极简主义色彩，电影级质感，金属冷硬风格。

(03:00 - 06:00) 瞬发：突破音障 (Instant Acceleration)
镜头： 侧面追踪镜头（Side Tracking Shot），伴随强烈的拉伸感（FOV Shift）。

动作： 机甲 
@image2
 的鸟脚状后肢猛地一踏，脚踝处的滑轮（Land Spinner）高速旋转。瞬间从静止变为超音速，海面被切开一道笔直的白浪。

特效： 产生圆锥形的音爆云（Sonic Boom），橙色残影在空中拉出一道锋利的直线。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

侧面动态追踪。机甲 
@image2
 瞬间爆发起跑。足部滑轮高速旋转，在海面上切开巨大的V形浪花。超音速冲击波云。极速运动模糊，机甲拉出长长的橙色轨迹残影。空间拉伸感，震撼的加速度视觉。

(06:00 - 10:00) 垂直机动：重力反转 (Vertical Evasion)
镜头： 动态环绕升降镜头（Crane & Orbit）。

动作： 机甲奔向一座半毁的沿海巨塔，完全不减速，直接顺着垂直的墙面向上冲刺。它在垂直墙面上进行了一个华丽的180度螺旋转身，避开假想的攻击。

特效： 碎裂的玻璃碎片在空中飞舞，折射出夕阳的橙光。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

动态环绕镜头。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在垂直建筑物表面高速冲刺，无视重力。身体进行优雅的螺旋旋转（Barrel Roll）。碎片飞溅，反射夕阳橙光。高对比度阴影，赛璐璐动画风格，极具张力的动作设计。

(10:00 - 13:00) 高光：战术滑行 (Tactical Slide)
镜头： 极低角度（Low Angle）对准足部。

动作： 机甲从高处跃下，足部在海面上进行长距离的漂移滑行。身体压低至极限，呈现掠食者般的姿态。

特效： 巨量的水雾被激起，在阳光下形成彩虹。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

极低角度。机甲 <<<Image1>>>   在海面上低重心漂移滑行。巨大的白色浪花与水雾。掠食者姿态，机械关节细致运作。夕阳余晖，金属反光，色彩饱和度极高，极致的画面纯净感。

(13:00 - 15:00) 尾声：单眼凝视 (The Glare)
镜头： 正面近景，逐渐变焦。

动作： 机甲滑行停止，身体由于惯性轻微晃动。头部导向板打开，中心那颗发光的青绿色单眼（Monocular）猛地看向镜头。

特效： 画面最后瞬间闪过一个“LOCK ON”的橙色UI界面，随即切黑。

[Prompt / 提示词]:

正面近景。机甲 
@image2
 停止滑行，蒸汽散去。头部青绿色单眼亮起，锐利冷酷。屏幕中心出现橙色锁定UI。电影级运镜，画面骤然切黑。

prompts.text: 無重力アクションシーン すごくいい感じに表現してくれます。 seedance2.0 @TopviewAIhq prompt 15-second continuous single-shot action sequence. No cuts. No scene transitions. Japanese-style anime action aesthetics, ultra-detailed, cinematic quality, with a cool color palette of cold whites, pale blues, and subtle neon reflections. Floating debris suspended in the air, dynamic motion, dramatic lighting, high-end anime film look. Character: A petite anime girl with long silver-white hair styled in twin low sections, soft layered strands flowing weightlessly, with subtle iridescent color streaks (cyan, magenta, yellow accents). Large teal-green eyes, calm and emotionless with a faint hint of softness. Wearing a black futuristic tactical jacket covered in multicolor glitch-like paint patterns (RGB splashes), high collar partially covering her mouth, multiple belts, pouches, and mechanical details. Equipped with sleek high-tech headphones with glowing accents. Slim build, delicate but precise movements. Weapon: A minimalist black katana with subtle reflective edge, clean and elegant design. Scene: Interior of a white, ethereal zero-gravity space. The environment is minimalistic and surreal, with soft glowing light, broken gravity, floating fragments of panels and geometric debris drifting slowly. The space feels silent, vast, and dreamlike. 0–3s — tension Camera drifts slowly in zero gravity. The girl floats in mid-air, hair and jacket drifting softly. She holds the katana loosely, body relaxed but ready. Tiny debris particles pass by in slow motion. 3–6s — ignition Enemy figures (abstract humanoid silhouettes, minimal detail) push off floating surfaces and rush toward her from multiple directions. She slightly tilts her head, eyes tracking movement precisely. 6–10s — chaos choreography Combat begins in full 360° zero-gravity space. She spins gracefully mid-air, body rotating fluidly while executing precise katana strikes. Each slash is clean and controlled, leaving faint neon trails (cool blue/purple). Camera follows her in a smooth tumbling motion, synchronized with her rotation, maintaining cinematic clarity. 10–13s — escalation She lightly touches a floating fragment with her foot, then forcefully launches herself forward. High-speed dash across multiple enemies in a straight, elegant line. Time slightly compresses, emphasizing speed and precision. 13–15s — final frame Motion slows down. Enemy bodies drift apart silently in zero gravity. She stabilizes her posture, floating upright. Hair and jacket settle gently. She lowers the katana slightly. Final frame holds on her calm expression in the white void. Freeze.

すごくいい感じに表現してくれます。
seedance2.0

@TopviewAIhq
 

prompt

15-second continuous single-shot action sequence.
No cuts. No scene transitions.

Japanese-style anime action aesthetics, ultra-detailed, cinematic quality, with a cool color palette of cold whites, pale blues, and subtle neon reflections. Floating debris suspended in the air, dynamic motion, dramatic lighting, high-end anime film look.

Character:
A petite anime girl with long silver-white hair styled in twin low sections, soft layered strands flowing weightlessly, with subtle iridescent color streaks (cyan, magenta, yellow accents). Large teal-green eyes, calm and emotionless with a faint hint of softness. Wearing a black futuristic tactical jacket covered in multicolor glitch-like paint patterns (RGB splashes), high collar partially covering her mouth, multiple belts, pouches, and mechanical details. Equipped with sleek high-tech headphones with glowing accents. Slim build, delicate but precise movements.

Weapon:
A minimalist black katana with subtle reflective edge, clean and elegant design.

Scene:
Interior of a white, ethereal zero-gravity space. The environment is minimalistic and surreal, with soft glowing light, broken gravity, floating fragments of panels and geometric debris drifting slowly. The space feels silent, vast, and dreamlike.

0–3s — tension  
Camera drifts slowly in zero gravity.  
The girl floats in mid-air, hair and jacket drifting softly.  
She holds the katana loosely, body relaxed but ready.  
Tiny debris particles pass by in slow motion.

3–6s — ignition  
Enemy figures (abstract humanoid silhouettes, minimal detail) push off floating surfaces and rush toward her from multiple directions.  
She slightly tilts her head, eyes tracking movement precisely.

6–10s — chaos choreography  
Combat begins in full 360° zero-gravity space.  
She spins gracefully mid-air, body rotating fluidly while executing precise katana strikes.  
Each slash is clean and controlled, leaving faint neon trails (cool blue/purple).  
Camera follows her in a smooth tumbling motion, synchronized with her rotation, maintaining cinematic clarity.

10–13s — escalation  
She lightly touches a floating fragment with her foot, then forcefully launches herself forward.  
High-speed dash across multiple enemies in a straight, elegant line.  
Time slightly compresses, emphasizing speed and precision.

13–15s — final frame  
Motion slows down.  
Enemy bodies drift apart silently in zero gravity.  
She stabilizes her posture, floating upright.  
Hair and jacket settle gently.  
She lowers the katana slightly.  
Final frame holds on her calm expression in the white void. Freeze.

prompts.text: Original Dark Fantasy Action Short Film: Inside a dilapidated church, a white-clad warrior and a black-armored opponent launch their final battle amid an atmosphere like a chorus. Stained glass shatters, moonlight penetrates the smoke and dust, and benches are overturned. prompts.text: The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

prompts.tweet_text:
Seedance 2.0 is the king of fast-paced videos. And,  
@umesh_ai
  always has a collection of cool prompts. Combining both with slight modifications, we can always extend creativity! 

Here's with a small twist - Prompt:

The camera rockets up from below, tearing past jagged cliff walls, then whips into a downward tilt to reveal the ocean below in full violent eruption, waves detonating against black rock. On the cliff edge stands a warrior woman, utterly fearless, gazing into the maelstrom as if daring it to rise higher. 

She steps forward without hesitation and leaps off the edge, arms spread wide, plummeting through howling wind and salt spray. The camera dives alongside her in freefall, her hair and cloak thrashing upward as the black rocks and churning sea rush closer. 

Then a massive shadow tears through the mist below — a dragon surges upward with wings unfurling like storm sails, scales gleaming wet with ocean spray. It swoops beneath her mid-fall, and she lands on its back with practiced grace, fingers gripping the ridges along its neck. The dragon banks hard, climbing in a spiraling arc back up past the cliff face. 

The camera keeps pace, circling tight, then pulls ahead into a final close, frontal reveal: she rides the beast skyward, wind-whipped, calm, and burning with determination, the raging ocean now small and powerless far below.

prompts.text: AI is officially on another level. I’ve been experimenting with Dreamina Seedance 2.0, and the results are getting scarily good. I wanted to see if I could push the limits of cinematic storytelling through AI, and after a few rounds of prompt-tuning, I managed to capture this intense aerial sequence. The video takes you right into the cockpit of a fighter jet mid-dogfight, ending with a massive bomb drop and a stunningly realistic explosion. This would be such a cool visual for a sci-fi project, a high-octane music video background, or even a concept trailer for a game. Let me know what you think of the realism! prompts.text: Seedance 2.0 is now on AI FILMS Studio and we put together a full walkthrough. prompts.text: A towering humanoid entity made of shifting translucent geometry appears above a megacity skyline, its body composed of overlapping dimensional planes reflecting alternate realities — hook at second two: the entity opens both hands and a vertical dimensional tear slices through the city. Reality splits. Two versions of the city begin occupying the same space. Buildings phase through each other as competing timelines collide. The destruction is dimensional and structural: streets fold into mirrored corridors, cars fall sideways into parallel gravity planes, and skyscrapers fragment into geometric shards as their alternate versions misalign. Every movement of the entity widens the rift. Entire districts slide into adjacent dimensions. The gauntlet unfolds through a skyline progressively divided between worlds: street level where pedestrians phase between realities → mid-rise districts where buildings overlap in transparent duplicates → rooftop where entire towers rotate into perpendicular universes. Aircraft vanish into dimensional folds. Bridges twist into impossible angles. Chase-cam flying through intersecting city layers as gravity shifts between realities. Velocity ramp when the dimensional rift expands wide enough to swallow an entire city block. Cut to aerial: the megacity now exists as two overlapping worlds drifting apart. The dimensional entity stands between them. Diegetic prismatic dimensional light reflecting through fractured architecture and overlapping skylines, cinematic multiverse distortion effects, particle fragments of shattered reality, 4K. Made in @dreamina_ai #DreaminaCPP #DreaminaAI

prompts.text: So I've been running Seedance 2.0 inside @lovart_ai and instead of just doing text-to-video, I wanted to build my own character and product from scratch using Nano Banana 2. For now let's call the product RAWFUEL. Sounds a bit weird, I know, but this is just for presentation purposes LOL One thing I really love about LovartAI is how manageable it keeps everything. One project page for everything. And because I use the Omni-Reference approach a lot, I end up generating a ton of sheets, from character sheets, location sheets, props sheets, object sheets. One thing people always bring up is that Seedance 2.0 struggles with real faces. I guess the trick is to simply not use close-up face references, because it will be detected as a real human face and Seedance doesn't allow that (for now). So stick to the three-view full-body format. My guess perhaps it gets detected as a 3D render instead? I don't know, just guessing lol. But it holds up surprisingly well. Here are the two sheets I generated: Character Sheet (@ IMAGE 1) photorealism, character sheet, three-view, full figure, white background, Indonesian woman, high ponytail hairstyle with three chrome hair clips, oversized black zip hoodie worn open, dark charcoal compression top underneath, black wide-leg cargo pants with contrast white stitching on the seams, chunky black and white low-top sneakers, thick silver chain necklace, small silver hoop earrings, dark moody attitude, front view center, side profile left, back view right, clean studio lighting with hard shadows, no background elements, full body head to toe. Product Sheet (@ IMAGE 2) photorealism, product shot, character sheet layout, three-view, white background, energy drink can, matte black aluminum can with brushed texture, tall slim format, bold neon orange and acid green graphic design on dark ground, large aggressive stylized text reading RAWFUEL across the center band, jagged electric bolt icon above the text, distressed glitch-pattern texture wrapping the can body, subtle condensation droplets on the lower third, front view center, 45-degree angle view left, back label view right, hard directional studio lighting, deep cast shadows, high contrast, no lens flare, commercial product photography style.

The key to this kind of prompt isn't just making the city description sound super cool, but ensuring the camera has a path to follow.

Once the camera route is nailed down too, the entire scene shifts straight from "good-looking" to "totally immersive."

Prompt is in the comments section.

#seedance2

(created with Seedance 2.0 on WaveSpeedAI) Available here: https:// wavespeed.ai/models/bytedan ce/seedance-2.0/text-to-video?ref=shaochiu ... Prompt share: Scene (0–5s): A stormy suburban American street at night, rain pouring, streetlights flickering. Close-up of a 7-year-old blond boy (soaked, cheeks flushed) crouching down, gently picking up a shivering stray orange cat. The cat meows weakly, clinging to his chest. Smash cut — the front door bursts open as the boy rushes into a warm yet tense living room. His mother (wearing a home knit sweater, stern expression) stands at the staircase, her face darkening. Dialogue 1 (Mom, furious and sharp): Are you kidding me?! You brought a dirty stray into MY house?! Scene (6–10s): The boy clutches the cat tightly, eyes tearing up, trying to explain. The cat suddenly stops shaking, slowly lifting its head, pupils shrinking unnaturally. In an instant — the orange cat LEAPS straight onto the mother’s face. Slow motion: claws latch onto her face, she lets out a suffocating scream, stumbling backward, knocking over furniture. The boy rushes forward in panic, desperately pulling at the cat. Dialogue 2 (Boy, breaking down): Stop! Stop! Let her go!! PLEASE!! Scene (11–15s): Extreme close-up — the boy finally yanks the cat off. Silence. The mother’s “face” peels off completely, along with her blonde hair, sliding down. Revealing — a green-skinned, large black-eyed alien face, wet and cold, staring directly forward. The boy’s pupils shake violently. The “face” drops from his hands onto the floor. The orange cat lands and slowly turns its head, eerily calm. The alien tilts its head slightly, mouth stretching into an unnatural smile. Dialogue 3 (Alien, low and eerie): ...You weren’t supposed to see that. Sound Design: Heavy rain and distant thunder at the start, door slam impact; mid-section tearing/claw impact, furniture crashing, suffocating screams; final section sudden silence → wet peeling sound → rising low-frequency horror tone, final line with subtle echo. Duration: Exactly 15 seconds (high-intensity American micro drama, dense shock beats, extreme twist payoff) #sd2 #seedance #CatsLover #aivideo

prompts.text: ByteDance just put a frontier AI video generator inside the editing app your little cousin already uses. Nobody noticed because it wasn't a launch event. It was a dropdown menu. Seedance 2.0. Inside CapCut. Text to video. Image to video. Audio to video. Multi-scene storyboarding. Realistic motion. Lip sync. Physics that actually looks right. Generate the clip, edit it, add effects, export — never leaving the app. One workflow. Zero technical knowledge required. OpenAI built Sora and made it a standalone product with a waitlist. Google built Veo and buried it inside a research demo. ByteDance built Seedance and slid it into an app with hundreds of millions of existing users. No press conference. No keynote. Just a feature update in an editor every TikTok creator on earth already has installed. Distribution beats benchmarks. Every single time. The VPN trick: set your location to Indonesia. CapCut unlocks Seedance 2.0 for free. Indonesia, Brazil, Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam — all live. Broader rollout coming. Right now, a 19-year-old in Jakarta has access to the same AI video generation that Hollywood studios are still negotiating licensing terms for. Nine images, three videos, three audio inputs per project. Multimodal. Consistent characters across scenes. Camera control. Up to 15-second clips generated from a text prompt and a reference photo. The quality gap between "AI-generated" and "professionally shot" just got uncomfortably narrow for anyone charging $10,000 per commercial. Sora made headlines. Seedance made a product. The difference between announcing a capability and embedding it into the daily workflow of 200 million creators is the difference between a demo and a disruption. ByteDance didn't win the AI video race by building the best model. It won by putting a very good model inside the app nobody thinks about because they already use it every day. The best AI tool isn't the smartest one. It's the one people actually open.

prompts.text: The 5 AI demos that broke the internet this week: 1. Claude Code got computer use Claude can now open apps, click through UIs, use the browser, and test code from the terminal. This is one of the clearest signs that AI agents are moving from chat to real software work. 2. Gemma 4 launched Google dropped its newest open models with long context, multimodal support, and commercial use. Open-weight models keep getting closer to what most people thought only frontier labs could ship. 3. OpenCode blew up An open-source Claude Code-style coding agent that works across multiple LLMs. One of the hottest workflows in AI just got a lot more remixable. 4. Seedance 2.0 pushed AI video forward Stronger motion, more control, and much more usable outputs. AI video keeps moving from “cool demo” to “actual creative tool.” 5. Anton feels like an AI coworker It connects to your data, writes code on the fly, builds dashboards, and remembers context. Closer to “AI employee” than “chatbot.” AI is moving so fast that most people miss the biggest launches entirely. Bookmark this. Next week’s list will look completely different.

The 5 AI demos that broke the internet this week:

1. Claude Code got computer use
Claude can now open apps, click through UIs, use the browser, and test code from the terminal.
This is one of the clearest signs that AI agents are moving from chat to real software work.

2. Gemma 4 launched
Google dropped its newest open models with long context, multimodal support, and commercial use.
Open-weight models keep getting closer to what most people thought only frontier labs could ship.

3. OpenCode blew up
An open-source Claude Code-style coding agent that works across multiple LLMs.
One of the hottest workflows in AI just got a lot more remixable.

4. Seedance 2.0 pushed AI video forward
Stronger motion, more control, and much more usable outputs.
AI video keeps moving from “cool demo” to “actual creative tool.”

5. Anton feels like an AI coworker
It connects to your data, writes code on the fly, builds dashboards, and remembers context.
Closer to “AI employee” than “chatbot.”

AI is moving so fast that most people miss the biggest launches entirely.

Bookmark this.

Next week’s list will look completely different.

prompts.text: Create a 4-second ultra-cute vertical animated character video. A tiny fluffy purple puppy-like creature with soft fur, a round face, big glossy expressive eyes, a small black nose, short floppy ears, and adorable baby proportions. The style is polished soft 3D animation, very cute, smooth fur, pastel purple background, soft studio lighting. The character walks forward slowly with natural body bounce and soft paw movement, first looking slightly away with an innocent expression. Then it turns its head and upper body toward the camera, gives a surprised but cheeky look, and raises one hand to show one middle finger clearly. It then turns forward again for a brief beat as if continuing to walk, then quickly looks back at the camera with a more mischievous expression and raises both hands, showing two middle fingers clearly at the same time. End on the double gesture for a brief moment so it is readable. Focus on smooth body plasticity, head turn, shoulder turn, eye movement, hand gesture clarity, and cute facial expression. The eyes must be large, shiny, and very expressive. The fur must look soft and detailed. The motion must be funny, cute, and playful, not aggressive. No text on screen. No captions. No overlays. Visual style: ultra-cute polished 3D character animation, soft pastel lighting, clean background, meme-ready, adorable but sassy. No realism, no horror, no ugly face, no distorted eyes, no extra fingers, no extra limbs, no blurry motion, no low-detail fur, no dark background, no aggressive tone, no human body proportions.

prompts.text: Yeah, multimodal references are a huge leap forward for AI video. Single prompts often feel like throwing darts in the dark—great for quick ideas, but creators need control, consistency, and iteration. Dreamina Seedance 2.0 gets that: feeding in images, text, and instructions to remix a viral donkey-on-motorcycle meme into a full ad-style sequence (barn escape, donuts, mountain jumps with slogan) shows real workflow alignment. This is the future—shifting from "prompt and pray" to true collaboration. Tools like this will dominate as they scale. What's your take on the next evolution?
